Please Provide Results Files:
Run the policy and evaluation script,  instructions are [here](https://github.com/allenai/molmospaces/blob/main/molmo_spaces/evaluation/README.md) to obtain .csv files or a zip of them.

Please Answer the following questions:
policy name: XXX
authors/institution name: XXX
MolmoBot or other in-domain data used: XXX
multi-task: XXX
data type (real/sim/mix): XXX
robot generalist: XXX
data opensourced: XXX
model opensourced: XXX
source link: XXX
model type, e.g. vla, wam, bm, vlm: XXX
embodiment: XXX
action space: XXX
no. of params: XXX
data released: XXX
chunk size (if applicable): XXX
context length (if applicable): XXX
